title: Powerfully Dense Turkish Meat Icli Kofte Bake
description: A sweet and dense Turkish dish featuring marsala wine, perfect for a hangover cure, this keto friendly icli kofte bake is a unique twist on traditional Turkish cuisine.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the ground beef, onion, marsala wine, bulgur, spices, and eggs, mixing well with your hands until just combined.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and shape into a large rectangle.
Drizzle the melted butter over the top of the meat mixture.
Sprinkle the chopped parsley over the top of the butter.
Bake the icli kofte for 35 minutes, or until the meat is cooked through and the top is lightly browned.
Remove the dish from the oven and let it rest for 10 minutes before slicing and serving.
Slice the icli kofte into thick rounds and serve hot.
Garnish with additional parsley if desired.
